top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Drop 5% as Chip Slump Fuels Overheating Concerns
top_signals.summary: Supercharged gains in a handful of companies and weak market breadth are stoking concerns that the world’s hottest stock market is overheating in some pockets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan supplies antiviral drug to U.K. in response to hantavirus
top_signals.summary: The U.K. Health Security Agency accepted delivery of the drug, which remains experimental for use to treat hantavirus.
